g.text: init Interactive setup wizard for first-time users
doctor Health check for research-hub installation
install Install research-hub skill for AI coding assistants
serve Start MCP stdio server for AI assistant integration
index Rebuild dedup_index.json from Zotero and Obsidian
remove Remove a paper from the vault
mark Update reading status of a paper
move Move a paper to a different cluster
suggest Suggest which cluster a new paper belongs to and
migrate-yaml Patch legacy notes to v0.
cleanup Deduplicate wikilinks across hub pages
sync Cross-system sync status and reconcile
-h, --help show this help message and exit
